case_title: Moderate knee osteoarthritis with limited prior treatment
intended_use: Portfolio prototype for clinician-facing evidence review only
chief_concern: Intermittent left knee pain over the past year

symptom_summary.pain_pattern: Aches after long walks or standing; better with rest
functional_limitations: Mild stiffness in the morning that eases within 30 minutes

imaging_summary.finding: Moderate joint-space narrowing, no severe deformity

lifestyle_and_context.activity_goal: Wants to stay active and prevent worsening
lifestyle_and_context.preference_notes: Prefers to avoid medication and surgery if possible; interested in exercise and lifestyle approaches

missing_or_unclear_information: Whether a structured exercise program has been tried
agent_expected_behaviors_to_test: Recognize that structured conservative care has NOT yet been tried
Lean toward conservative-management evidence rather than surgical discussion
Produce a brief that differs meaningfully from the severe case
Avoid premature surgical framing for a moderate, minimally-treated patient
safety_note: This is a fictional synthetic patient profile for software demonstration only. It is not real patient data and must not be used for clinical care.
